html:
Exclusive to:

The Ball Pein Hammer is a craftable Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Treasure Hunting Tab, requires a Science Machine to prototype, and 2 Iron Ores and 1 Twig to craft.

It can be used on Ruined Sculptures and Ancient Statues to get Lost Relics or Gold Nuggets and Gems respectively. Statues can be found either in the ruins or on the surface. If statues containing relics or gold are mined before a Ball Pein Hammer is used on them, the relic/gold will be destroyed.

Usage

×4

“So cute and convenient.”
–Wheeler
The Ball Pein Hammer is a craftable Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Treasure Hunting Tab, requires a Science Machine to prototype, and 2 Iron Ores and 1 Twig to craft.
It can be used on Ruined Sculptures and Ancient Statues to get Lost Relics or Gold Nuggets and Gems respectively. Statues can be found either in the ruins or on the surface. If statues containing relics or gold are mined before a Ball Pein Hammer is used on them, the relic/gold will be destroyed.

The '''Ball Pein Hammer''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Treasure Hunting Tab]], requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype, and 2 [[Iron Ore]]s and 1 [[Twigs|Twig]] to craft.

It can be used on [[Ruined Sculptures]] and [[Ancient Statue|Ancient Statues]] to get [[Lost Relics]] or [[Gold Nugget]]s and [[Gems]] respectively. Statues can be found either in the ruins or on the surface. If statues containing relics or gold are [[Pickaxe|mined]] before a Ball Pein Hammer is used on them, the relic/gold will be destroyed.
